title: The Mighty Jungle
director: Arnold Belgard, David DaLie, Ismael Rodríguez
writer: Arnold Belgard, David DaLie, Ismael Rodríguez
actors: Marshall Thompson, David DaLie, Antonio Gutiérrez
plot: A South American expedition is in search of fortune thought to be hidden in a lost Aztec city. While trudging through the jungles the main character becomes detached from the group. He develops a fever and, in a desperate attempt ...
